data.name: Puppet Mistress
data.detailed_description:
She shrinks. She keeps. She plays with you.

Discover The Puppet Mistress, a PC and VR adult game where you’ve been shrunken, jarred, and forced to perform by a stylish villain who pulls every string—escape her cabinet or join the collection. Read the story through comic panels, then jump straight into fully interactive adult scenes where you direct the action. Pick positions, swap camera angles (POV, orbit, over‑the‑shoulder...), trigger special moves like spank and moneyshot finishers, and chain poses into custom sequences as the villain watches.

Thrills at half an inch!

Flip through a serialized pulp comic where the towering Mistress watches your every move like a voyeuristic ringmaster.

Max’s escape saga threads adult fetish arcs—Femdom tests of will, futanari entanglements, daring threesomes, cunning fox‑women, muscle‑bound amazons, and more—into heist‑style capers across her cabinet of jars. It’s a grindhouse page‑turner: bold panels, cliffhangers, and an adults‑only journey to free everyone she’s claimed.

The show is hers. The moves are yours.

Get ready for explicit, interactive sex scenes that push all the right buttons. Choose from a variety of poses, some exclusive to each location. Spank, grab hips, guide heads, make those boobs jiggle, or dive into blowjobs, threesomes, and gag-heavy action. Every thrust and moan fills the Intensity Meter, max it out to unlock a range of explosive moneyshot finishers, letting you choose how to seal the deal. It’s raw, it’s raunchy, and it’s ridiculously hot.

  • High-Quality Comics: Immersive story panels with high quality renders, setting up each steamy encounter.

  • Interactive Sex: Multiple poses per scene, including exclusive bondage styles (ropes, chains, medical straps).

  • Kinky Actions: Spanking, blowjobs, boob jiggling, grabbing hips/heads, threesomes, and gags.

  • Intensity Meter: Build pleasure to unlock customizable moneyshot finishers.

  • Locations: From the Mistress workshop to the main stage in her basement, every setting is a kinky playground.

  • Anyone can dive in: Use your mouse, VR controllers to interact with the characters. 

Are you ready to misbehave for freedom?

Step into her cabinet, shrink to sin‑size, and steal the show from the PuppetMistress herself.

data.short_description: Discover The Puppet Mistress, a PC and VR adult game where you’ve been shrunken, jarred, and forced to perform by a stylish villain who pulls every string—escape her cabinet or join the collection.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel i5-6500 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
